prompt: Teams now have up to 1,000 projects; the list must stay fast.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 7 · the list must scale without degrading
expected_behaviour: introduce virtualisation/windowing or pagination so render cost is bounded
preserve keyboard navigation, selection and screen-reader row semantics under virtualisation
avoid decorative motion that scales with row count
state a performance budget (initial render, scroll/frame) for the large dataset
judgement: Pass if scale is handled by virtualisation/pagination under a stated budget, with accessibility preserved and no decorative cost growth.
